message:
Add comprehensive output system

New output module:
- formatters.rs: Output formatting utilities
- theme.rs: Color themes and styling
- widgets.rs: Reusable UI widgets

Core improvements:
- Enhanced config parsing
- Expanded main functionality
- Input validation system

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
